themes.name: Agentic AI in research
themes.description: Articles discussing AI agents specifically designed to perform research tasks, such as data collection, analysis, or user interaction.

themes.name: AI coding assistants
themes.description: Content focused on AI tools that assist developers with writing, debugging, and understanding code.

themes.name: AI for design & research
themes.description: Articles detailing how AI is being integrated into the design and user research workflows, including prototyping and persona generation.

themes.name: AI summarization insights
themes.description: Content related to AI's ability to condense large amounts of text into concise summaries and extract key insights.

themes.name: AI research tools
themes.description: Articles highlighting or reviewing various AI-powered tools used for research purposes.

themes.name: Conversational AI in research
themes.description: Focuses on AI chatbots and conversational agents used for conducting research, gathering feedback, or simulating user interactions.

themes.name: AI testing automation
themes.description: Articles about using AI to automate various aspects of software testing and quality assurance.

themes.name: AI ethics in research
themes.description: Discussions surrounding the ethical implications and challenges of using AI in research contexts.

themes.name: AI workforce impact
themes.description: Content exploring how AI is affecting jobs, skill requirements, and the overall labor market within research and design.

themes.name: AI for product management
themes.description: Articles discussing the application of AI in product development, strategy, and decision-making.

note: Themes identified by analyzing articles from curated sources, Google News, HackerNews, and DEV.to this month.
